* Update to 0.11.13

ChangeLog:

  https://blog.prosody.im/prosody-0.11.13-released/

QA:

  * portlint: OK (1 warning regarding the use of /var/db)
  * testport: OK (poudriere: 12.3-AMD64/i386, 13.0-AMD64/ARM64)

This update fixes a memory leak caused by the recent security update.
